reasoning: Prakriti leans Pitta-Vata due to lifelong tendencies of fluctuating energy, stress sensitivity, and digestive variability. Vikriti shows Pitta excess (acidity, burning, ravenous appetite, anger, night sweats) with secondary Vata disturbance (constipation, bloating, dry skin, anxiety). Classical texts (e.g., Charaka Samhita Sutra 20) associate Pitta with heat, acidity, and sharp emotions, while Vata governs movement and erratic symptoms.
